subcodes.first_line: In this day the Truth, exalted be His glory, is the Helper of creation, yet the people, in their ignorance, persist in denial, rejection, aversion and protest [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: امروز حق جل جلاله معین خلق است ولکن خلق جاهل بر نفی و طرد و اعراض و اعتراض
subcodes.subjects: @suffering and imprisonment, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @exhortations and counsels, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
